title: 前日譚②　～ボーカルレッスン！～

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: So, it's settled! We'll be havin' our singin' lessons...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whoa! The blue sky, the white clouds, this indescribable scent of
the wild! Why?! Oh, WHY?! Answer me, Shiraoki!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Oh! Scarlet, get a load of that bull over there! It's huge! Man, I wanna grab those handlebar horns and drive it around like a motorcycle!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
This isn't the time to be messing around! We're supposed to be
having a rehearsal! Ugh, I knew something smelled fishy once we got
on that train...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
No, no, there's a good reason I brought y'all this far! I heard the
venue for the commemorative concert is gonna be enormous!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
That's why we're here at this big ol' ranch where we can practice
singin' big and loud!
